title: Conversion rate by channel
prompt: For each channel, compute the conversion rate = converted sessions ÷ total sessions, as a percentage rounded to 1 decimal. Columns: channel, conversion_rate. Order by conversion_rate desc, then channel.

generic: ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN converted THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1)

hints: Numerator: count of converted sessions (SUM(CASE WHEN converted THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)).
Multiply by 100.0 (not 100) to force decimal division, then ROUND(…, 1).
